current_run.problem_name: Hidden Cyclic Majority of Pairwise Products
current_run.description: This problem searches for a secret configuration of bits that determines the output of a function based on the cyclic majority of pairwise products of bits in a shifted input. Specifically, for an N-bit input x, we compute the pairwise products of adjacent bits (x_i * x_{i+1}) cyclically, then find the majority of these products. The secret determines if this majority matches a certain target value. This involves non-linear operations (products) and cyclic shifts, making it distinct from linear problems.
